Bash(cd "/c/Users/RT/Desktop/AF Apparel" && docker-compose run --rm backend python -c "
import os, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/app'\)
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
from passlib.context import CryptContext

db_url = os.environ.get\('DATABASE_URL_SYNC'\)
engine = create_engine\(db_url\)
pwd = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt'], deprecated='auto'\)
hashed = pwd.hash\('Admin123!'\)
with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    conn.execute\(text\(\\"UPDATE users SET hashed_password = :h, first_name = 'Admin', last_name = 'User' WHERE email = 'admin@afapparels.com'\\"\), {'h': hashed}\)
    conn.commit\(\)
print\('Password updated successfully'\)
" 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/RT/Desktop/AF Apparel" && docker exec afapparel_postgres psql -U afapparel -d afapparel_db -c "SELECT email, LEFT\(hashed_password, 10\) as hash_prefix FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@afapparels.com';")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/RT/Desktop/AF Apparel" && docker-compose run --rm backend python -c "
import os, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/app'\)
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text
from passlib.context import CryptContext

db_url = os.environ.get\('DATABASE_URL_SYNC'\)
engine = create_engine\(db_url\)
pwd = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt'], deprecated='auto'\)

with engine.connect\(\) as conn:
    row = conn.execute\(text\(\\"SELECT hashed_password FROM users WHERE email = 'admin@afapparels.com'\\"\)\).fetchone\(\)
    stored_hash = row[0]
    print\('Stored hash:', stored_hash[:20], '...'\)
    print\('Verify Admin123!:', pwd.verify\('Admin123!', stored_hash\)\)
    print\('Verify ChangeMe123!:', pwd.verify\('ChangeMe123!', stored_hash\)\)
" 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/RT/Desktop/AF Apparel" && docker exec afapparel_postgres psql -U afapparel -d afapparel_db -c "
SELECT 'users' as table_name, count\(*\) as count FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'companies', count\(*\) FROM companies
UNION ALL SELECT 'products', count\(*\) FROM products
UNION ALL SELECT 'product_variants', count\(*\) FROM product_variants
UNION ALL SELECT 'categories', count\(*\) FROM categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'warehouses', count\(*\) FROM warehouses
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory', count\(*\) FROM inventory
UNION ALL SELECT 'pricing_tiers', count\(*\) FROM pricing_tiers
UNION ALL SELECT 'shipping_tiers', count\(*\) FROM shipping_tiers
UNION ALL SELECT 'orders', count\(*\) FROM orders
UNION ALL SELECT 'settings', count\(*\) FROM settings
ORDER BY table_name;
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json
data = json.dumps\({'email': 'admin@afapparels.com', 'password': 'Admin123!'}\).encode\(\)
req = urllib.request.Request\('http://localhost:8000/api/v1/login', data=data, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}\)
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req\)
    print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print\(e.code, e.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
")
